name: streamops-twitch-bot
description: Modular Twitch broadcast automation platform with OBS bridge, overlays, dashboard, LoL participation queue, and Codex automation scaffolding.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:bridge && npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:overlay && npm run build:email-worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:run: npm --workspace packages/shared run test:run && npm --workspace apps/server run test:run && npm --workspace apps/bridge run test:run && npm --workspace apps/dashboard run test:run && npm --workspace apps/overlay run test:run && npm run test:ops && npm run check:tokens && npm run check:css-overrides && npm run test:visual:baseline && npm run test:visual:diff
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace packages/shared run test:run && npm run build:server && npm --workspace apps/server run test:run && npm run build:bridge && npm --workspace apps/bridge run test:run && npm --workspace apps/dashboard run test:run && npm --workspace apps/overlay run test:run && npm run test:ops && npm run check:tokens && npm run check:css-overrides && npm run test:visual:baseline && npm run test:visual:diff
